reviews.review_description:
Dual Gun Reflex is a fun free Mixed Reality game where coordination and precision are essential. You shoot incoming objects while staying alert, as things quickly get tricky when targets hide behind different colors or overlap in your physical space.

The tension ramps up when enemies start firing projectiles at you, forcing you to physically move out of the way. This adds a great layer of intensity and keeps you fully engaged. The rhythm is fast, the challenge is well balanced, and the gameplay stays exciting throughout.

With new features planned by the developer, this is already a solid and enjoyable MR experience. Definitely worth trying—especially since it’s free!
